hypothesis: Increase min_child_samples to 100 (from 50) combined with lambda_l2=1.0 and lambda_l1=0.1. Previous best (exp_0078) used lambda_l2=1.0, lambda_l1=0.0 and scored 0.94436. Increasing min_child_samples reduces overfitting on sparse items. Also adding small L1 regularization for feature sparsity. All other settings match exp_0078 (num_leaves=256, max_depth=8, lr=0.04, tweedie=1.5).
